name: Shoua Lee
about: I am a data professional with experience in analytics, econometrics, and machine learning with a focus on building practical, business-driven solutions.
resume_summary: Currently, my portfolio includes projects in mortgage default modeling, customer satisfaction analysis, and data storytelling, with more projects continuously in development.

projects.name: Wisconsin Mortgage PD Model
projects.summary: Built a probability of default model to estimate 12-month mortgage default risk using traditional methods from Freddie Mac's mortgage origination and performance data.

projects.name: Hotel Review PRA Analysis
projects.summary: Used penalty-reward analysis to classify hotel attributes as basic factors, performance factors, or delighters.
